headline.text: L1 S2 lost *2 hours 6 minutes* to a blown seal in the heavy cream system — back cooking at 05:57.

per_plant_summary.L1: S2 had the biggest hit: a blown ingredient-side seal stopped all caramel cooking from 03:51 until 05:57. The decrystalizer was also found plugged during Oreo changeover — maintenance cleared it by midday. S3 ran clean after a quick scraper adjustment at start of shift. S4 cooked 13 CRU batches but paused late 3rd shift after C2 overfilled and pushed caramel up the steam pipe.
per_plant_summary.L2: ML3 ran well aside from two planned belt changes during CIL. A ceiling leak above the line was reported at 11:06 and still dripping by end of 3rd shift — maintenance aware. ML2 and FFS both steady with routine maintenance windows.
per_plant_summary.L3: ML4 had three vacuum-related stoppages: TG5 down 102 minutes for a broken belt part (cleared 13:12), TG4 down from 09:41 until 17:08 for a clogged filter, and TG5 again at 20:55 for 25 minutes. TG4 reported blow-offs again at 07:07 with maintenance on-site. Five rolls from 3rd shift remain on hold for quality review.

notes.text: Curt Willis noted the S2 decrystalizer would have forced a full shutdown within hours if the clean hadn't been scheduled.
S2 reworked 10 pallets for incorrect jar orientation between 05:12 and 06:31 — operator repeatedly instructed on correct procedure.
Maintenance added M4 tracking roller cleaning to PM schedule after repeated faults; active tracking now installed on M13 conveyor.

resolved.title: S2 decrystalizer plugged during Oreo run
resolved.summary: Decrystalizer found heavily plugged with cookie material during changeover; maintenance disassembled and cleaned.
resolved.resolution: Cleaned and tested for ATP/allergens by 13:52 — "Russell Finex was cleaned and is being tested" (Katya Farnsworth).

resolved.title: S2 heavy cream seal failure stopped caramel cooking
resolved.summary: Blown seal on the ingredients side caused heavy cream to dump into the wrong kettle; line ran out of caramel and went down until maintenance replaced the seal.
resolved.resolution: Seal replaced by 04:39, cooking resumed, caramel back at conbar by 05:57 — "Sending caramel at the conbar" (Joseph Scott).

resolved.title: S4 vanilla pump configuration fault
resolved.summary: Vanilla pump changed its setting from 220 g/h to 12,000 g/h; operators caught it and stopped the pump immediately.
resolved.resolution: Power reset performed, pump restored to normal operation by 10:49 — "We restored the vanilla pump to proper operation" (Marcos Jimenez).

resolved.title: S2 jar conveyor belt snapped on startup
resolved.summary: Four links of the MD jar belt broke at 17:49; maintenance believed it was routed incorrectly through underside guiderails causing bind.
resolved.resolution: Fixed by 18:45 — "The jar conveyor has been fixed" (Caleb York).

resolved.title: S2 X-ray reject arm not ejecting
resolved.summary: X-ray detected product but the reject arm was not ejecting jars; valve found closed.
resolved.resolution: Valve opened and X-ray toggled off/on by 22:23 — "Maintenance has adjusted the X-rays, and it now reads the cards" (Elizabeth Hernandez).

resolved.title: S2 jar orientation rework on 10 pallets
resolved.summary: Final inspection found most jars positioned incorrectly (label not forward); operator had been repeatedly instructed on correct procedure.
resolved.resolution: Line stopped, all 10 pallets corrected by 06:31 — "All pallets have been corrected" (Karen Velastegui).

resolved.title: S3 tunnel 1 scraper causing belt vibration
resolved.summary: Last scraper on tunnel 1 built up with product, causing belt to vibrate; line stopped to clean.
resolved.resolution: Cleaned immediately, back running — "Line is running" (Luis Falcon, 01:14).

resolved.title: ML3 cross conveyor belt replacement during CIL
resolved.summary: Belt changed out during first-shift CIL at 08:17; quality performed ATP.
resolved.resolution: Belt passed ATP, line running by 08:49 — "Line up" (Molding Line 3 Pack).

resolved.title: FFS line down for knife cleaning
resolved.summary: Line stopped at 06:28 for maintenance to clean the knife.

resolved.title: ML4 TG4 vacuum system clogged
resolved.summary: Vacuum not suctioning, causing blow-offs; operators noted bins full, suggesting it hadn't worked all day.
resolved.resolution: Top of funnel above filter found clogged, cleared by 17:08 — "We have vacuum again" (Tyson Fausett).

resolved.title: ML4 TG5 down 102 minutes on broken belt part
resolved.summary: Loose piece prevented blue belt from moving properly; maintenance took it to the shop to repair.
resolved.resolution: Plate installed and running good by 13:12 — "TG5 is running good now" (Nathan Ruiz).

resolved.title: ML4 TG5 multiples from clogged vacuum funnel
resolved.summary: TG5 had multiples for 20 minutes; operators and maintenance working on it.
resolved.resolution: Problem was clogged vacuum funnel, cleared by 21:20 — "Problem was clogged vacuum funnel" (Tyson Fausett).

resolved.title: ML4 depositor #2 agitator stopped
resolved.summary: Agitator for 1-shot tank on depositor 2 not moving; maintenance called.
resolved.resolution: Fixed in 4 minutes — "Agitator is fixed. It was an over limit faults on the VFD" (Itzel Chavez, 06:31).

resolved.title: Truffle line jacketed pipe water leak
resolved.summary: Approximately one gallon of water leaking from jacketed pipe; initially thought to be coconut oil.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance tightened hose, leak stopped — "It was about a gallon of water. It came from jacketed pipe" (Marcos Montano).

needs_attention.title: S4 C2 caramel overfilled, pushed up steam pipe
needs_attention.summary: C2 overfilled to the point caramel was forcing up the steam pipe at 21:32; unclear if pressure-driven or operator error; paused CRU production.
needs_attention.status: Finishing C1, then scrapping what remains in C2; investigating root cause as of 21:56.

needs_attention.title: S2 bark breaker finish chipping off
needs_attention.summary: FSQA swab identified finish coating chipping from bark breaker surface during post-clean inspection.
needs_attention.status: Victor Romero will reclean tomorrow per Charity Young at 16:01.

needs_attention.title: S2 heavy cream pump gasket broken
needs_attention.summary: Gasket on heavy cream pump found broken at shift handoff; maintenance will replace.
needs_attention.status: Identified at 07:02, maintenance notified to replace gasket.

needs_attention.title: ML3 ceiling leak above line
needs_attention.summary: Water dripping from ceiling or ductwork above ML3; reported at 11:06, still dripping as of 21:55 on 3rd shift.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance checking source; appears to be from roof via outer duct as of 02:54.

needs_attention.title: ML4 TG4 blow-offs with maintenance on-site
needs_attention.summary: TG4 down at 07:07 for excessive blow-offs; maintenance called to line.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance on-site as of 07:07; no resolution posted by window close at 07:15.

needs_attention.title: 5 rolls from 3rd shift on hold for quality review
needs_attention.summary: Partial rolls marked bad by 3rd shift tested and confirmed out of spec; separated for hold.
needs_attention.status: Six rolls on hold as of 15:02, being documented with photos for disposition.
